_comment: Hand-derived (implementation-plan.md fixtures rule, WP-11), same envelope assumption as steps.json (see its _comment). Active Energy Burned is an Interval (I) type per base-knowledge.md §3; value key `active_energy_burned.kcal` (field name assumed -- kcal matches the unit HealthKit itself uses for activeEnergyBurned, HKUnit.kilocalorie()). base-knowledge.md §5: Google gives a single energy total -- this type maps only to HKQuantityTypeIdentifierActiveEnergyBurned; SyncKit's TypeMapper deliberately does NOT invent a basalEnergyBurned split from Google's separate Total Calories type (see TypeMapper.swift's decideHealthKitMapped doc comment). Mirrored in SyncKit's TypeMapperFixtures.activeEnergyBurnedPoint().
